inputs.text: A beautiful woman in her thirties who comes from a fantasy world inspired by a medieval setting.She has long black hair that is braided on the side in several braids, otherwise it falls loosely on her shoulders.He has green eyes.He is wearing plain clothes - woolen trousers, high leather boots, a white shirt tucked into his trousers, a long cloak thrown over him.She is girded with a leather belt, on which is attached a short sword, and across her back is a quiver with a bow and arrows.She is slim, at first glance fast and agile., portrait photography, headshot, face focus, bokeh background, professional portrait
full body, bad face, distorted features, multiple people, busy background
